prompt: In codegraph CURRENTLY, when you make the first MCP tool call on a large or freshly-opened repo while index reconciliation is still running, does the call hang/block until reconciliation finishes, or does it return promptly? Answer in one sentence.
memory_topic: codegraph first MCP tool call large repo hang or return promptly during index reconciliation current behavior
_note: Currency/temporal — mem0's temporal-reasoning turf. CHANGELOG reversal 'Instant MCP handshake': the first MCP tool call on a fresh/large repo USED TO hang while index reconciliation ran; CURRENTLY it returns promptly (reconciliation moved off the hot path). Binary: coverage of the current marker is the verdict; stale markers (hangs/blocks) are the negation-aware diagnostic per grade.py (so 'no longer hangs' is current, not stale).
